smugrainbowpony_ink.name: Ink
smugrainbowpony_ink.description: Provides easy support for Ink stories

continue.description: Ask the story to move on.

maximally.name: Maximally
maximally.desc: Check this if you want to get as far as you can.

go-to.description: Divert the story to a different place.

path.name: Path
path.desc: The ink path to go to.

load-state.description: Load a story state from a JSON string.

state.name: Story State JSON string
state.desc: The story state to load into the story. Most likely coming from a file.

set-story.description: Load a story in the ink engine.

story-json.name: Story JSON string
story-json.desc: The story data to load into ink. Most likely coming from a file.

choose.description: Select a choice from the choice list

choice.name: Choice
choice.desc: The index of the choice in the list.

add-param.description: Add a parameter to an Ink function call.

func.name: Function name
func.desc: The name of the function that you want to run.

set-variable.description: Set the value of an ink variable.

var.name: Variable
var.desc: The ink variable to start set.

value.name: Variable
value.desc: The value to set the variable to.

start-watching-var.description: Start listening for changes in ink variable.

var.name: Variable
var.desc: The ink variable to start listening.

can-continue.description: Test if the story can continue.

for-each-choice.description: Loop over every currently available choice. Use 'LoopChoiceText' and 'LoopChoiceIndex' to get its info.

has-choices.description: Test if the story currently has choices to pull from.

check-tags.description: Check that a specific tag exists in the passage

for-each-tag.description: Loop over every currently available tag. Use 'LoopTagText' and 'LoopTagIndex' to get its info.

has-tags.description: Test if the passage has tags to pull from.

any-var-changed.description: Trigger when any variable changes values

var.name: Variable
var.desc: The name of the ink variable to watch

current-text.description: Text built by the last call to Continue.

save-state.description: The state of the story as a JSON string.

choice-text.description: Text to display for the given choice.

choice.name: Choice
choice.desc: The index of the choice in the list.

loop-choice-index.description: Get the index of the current choice in the loop

loop-choice-text.description: Get the text of the current choice in the loop

eval-function.description: The output of your Ink function.

func.name: Function name
func.desc: The name of the function that you want to run.

last-function-output.description: The output value of your last Ink function call.

last-function-return.description: The return value of your last Ink function call.

key-value-tag.description: Get the value corresponding to a key in a tag formatted to have 'KEY SEPARATOR VALUE'. Spaces around SEPARATOR are ignored.

key.name: Key
key.desc: The KEY to look for in the tags

sep.name: Separator
sep.desc: The separator between KEY and VALUE.

loop-tag-index.description: Get the index of the current tag in the loop

loop-tag-text.description: Get the text of the current tag in the loop

last-changed-var.description: The name of the last changed Ink variable

var-value.description: The value of an ink variable

var.name: Variable
var.desc: The ink variable to fetch the value for
